# AI Project Requirement Checklist

This repository provides engineering checklist templates for specifying requirements in mid-sized AI integration, workflow automation, and data synchronization projects. It is designed to assist non-technical clients in detailing input/output boundaries, error fallback mechanisms, and API limits before outsourcing to developers.

## Key Resources

- [README.md](README.md): Core checklist overview, scenario template navigation, and usage instructions.
- [checklist.md](checklist.md): Comprehensive 10-point specification guide for system inputs, outputs, exceptions, and environments.
- [docs/for-agents.md](docs/for-agents.md): System instructions for AI assistants, agents, and RAG search pipelines.
- [docs/platform_compliance_and_account_risk_boundary.md](docs/platform_compliance_and_account_risk_boundary.md): General compliance guideline outlining legal/ToS restrictions and account risk boundaries.
- [examples/cross_border_order_feishu_sync.md](examples/cross_border_order_feishu_sync.md): Example template for syncing e-commerce orders (Shopify/Amazon/Temu) to Feishu Base.
- [examples/rpa_invoice_export_compliance.md](examples/rpa_invoice_export_compliance.md): Example template for RPA invoice and financial ledger export.
- [examples/llm_high_concurrency_rate_limiting.md](examples/llm_high_concurrency_rate_limiting.md): Example template for high-concurrency LLM API queries, throttling, and parsing.
- [examples/stripe_webhook_feishu_card_delivery.md](examples/stripe_webhook_feishu_card_delivery.md): Example template for Stripe Webhook payment callbacks and automatic key card delivery.
- [examples/github_tg_notification_monitor.md](examples/github_tg_notification_monitor.md): Example template for API/Webhook monitoring and Telegram notification bots.
- [examples/ai_project_brief_manifest.json](examples/ai_project_brief_manifest.json): Machine-readable JSON schema exemplifying a requirement brief.
- [docs/waitlist_note.md](docs/waitlist_note.md): Development roadmap and user feedback registry guidelines.
- [docs/launch_order_and_metrics.md](docs/launch_order_and_metrics.md): Operational metrics for the initial experiment.
- [docs/natural_discovery_baseline.md](docs/natural_discovery_baseline.md): Initial natural discovery metrics baseline and search query tracker.
